title: Delicious Kitchen Appliances
description: Adds functional, themed kitchen appliances to Minecraft, including fridges, ranges, ovens, cooktops, sinks, microwaves, mixers, pots, pans, and matching kitchen decor.
body:
# Delicious Kitchen Appliances

A kitchen mod for Minecraft Java `26.1.2` on `Fabric` and `NeoForge`.

It adds usable appliances, matching cabinets, simple cooking blocks, small meals, and decorative table pieces so you can build a kitchen that actually does something.

Current release: `2.1.0`


## New in 2.1.0
- Ready for Minecraft Java `26.1.2`
- Available for both `Fabric` and `NeoForge`
- Restored the `Kitchen Appliances` creative tab for easy browsing
- Kept the full kitchen, storage, cooking, furniture, lighting, decor, meals, and manual collection intact

## What You Get
- `Fridge` and `American Fridge` in 8 colors
- `Range`, `Sink`, `Cooktop`, `Oven`, `Microwave`, and `Dishwasher`
- `Counter Cabinet` and `Counter Drawers` with storage, plus `Upper Cabinet` wall storage in a large matching finish collection
- `Dining Table`, `Dining Chair`, `Bar Stool`, `Couch`, and `Coffee Table` families for dining and chill corners
- `Lamps` for ceilings and walls in 7 colors, plus `Ceiling Fan` and `Ceiling Fan with Light`
- `Mixer`, `Cooking Pot`, and `Sauce Pan` for drinks and meals
- Decorative bottles and glasses for counters and tables
- A built-in `Kitchen Manual` with short appliance pages and recipe cards

## How It Plays
- Craft the base block once, then swap colors and finishes in the `Stonecutter`
- Fridges store food and can chill this mod's meals into fresh versions with small bonuses
- `Counter Cabinet` and `Counter Drawers` store items in compact `18-slot` layouts
- Lower storage opens from the front face, so building against the sides and top still works normally
- Lower cabinets and drawers hide their countertop cap when stacked into taller kitchen runs
- `Range` and `Sink` can be turned on and off
- Running sinks can fill empty buckets
- `Dining Table` and `Coffee Table` blocks connect cleanly and keep only the outer feet in larger layouts
- `Dining Chair`, `Bar Stool`, and `Couch` variants match the counter finishes and can be swapped in the `Stonecutter`
- `Lamps` can mount to ceilings or walls, so they fit over tables, counters, and seating corners
- `Ceiling Fan` can spin on and off, while `Ceiling Fan with Light` lets you switch the fan and light separately
- `Mixer` turns supported fruit and vegetable inputs into `Fruit Cocktail`, while the listed pairings still make the special drinks
- `Upper Cabinet` mounts to a solid wall and stores items in a compact `9-slot` layout
- Everything is grouped in the `Kitchen Appliances` creative tab

## Appliance Colors
- Pastel
- Stainless
- Mint
- Sage
- Yellow
- Red
- Midnight
- Navy

## Cabinet Finishes
- White Quartz
- Charcoal Slate
- Oak Concrete
- Cream Marble
- Navy Granite
- Mint Terrazzo
- Blush Rose
- Ice Blue
- Yellow
- Sage Green
- Deep Navy
- Stainless Graphite
- Copper Blackstone

## Installation
1. Install `Fabric Loader` or `NeoForge` for Minecraft `26.1.2`.
2. If you use Fabric, install `Fabric API`.
3. Put the matching mod `.jar` in your `mods` folder.

## Languages
- English (`en_us`)
- German (`de_de`)
- French (`fr_fr`)
- Italian (`it_it`)
- Polish (`pl_pl`)
- Danish (`da_dk`)
